title: Key Contributions and Influence of James H. Martin in NLP
description: A timeline showing the major publications, concepts, and academic contributions by James H. Martin that have impacted the field of Natural Language Processing.
elements: Publication of 'Speech and Language Processing' (1st Ed, 2000)
Research on Metaphor and Figurative Language
Academic Leadership at University of Colorado Boulder
relationships: Foundational textbook led to educational tools (NLTK)
Research areas built upon core textbook concepts
